summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zanzibar lesson plan updates - all required features working correctly including empty teacher fields, Print/Download functionality, and improved MyHub styling
passed_tests: Backend API /api/lessons/generate returns empty teacherEvaluation and remarks fields as required
MyHub page displays lesson cards correctly with proper layout
View modal opens successfully with structured layout
Print button exists, is clickable, and properly styled in modal header
Download button exists, is clickable, and properly styled in modal header
Lesson Development table displays with correct 5-column layout (STEPS/HATUA, TIME/MUDA, TEACHING ACTIVITIES, LEARNING ACTIVITIES, ASSESSMENT/TATHMINI)
All table headers show proper bilingual English/Swahili labels
Section titles have dark header styling with white text on dark background
Teacher's Evaluation field shows '(To be filled by teacher after lesson)' placeholder
Remarks field shows '(To be filled by teacher)' placeholder
Authentication and session management working properly
MyHub navigation and page loading functional

success_percentage.backend: 100% (all API endpoints working, empty teacher fields confirmed)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (MyHub, modal view, Print/Download buttons all functional)
